task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the patrol requirements text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like gedit, nano) or terminal output (like cat) displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/QGC/patrol_requirements.txt.

task_completion.description: Agent creates the required waypoints in QGroundControl.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl 'Plan' view is open, showing multiple waypoints (at least 4) placed on the map to form a patrol route.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the waypoint altitudes according to the requirements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The mission item list or waypoint editor in QGroundControl shows the altitude set to a value between 30 and 50 meters.

task_completion.description: Agent adds a DO_CHANGE_SPEED command to the mission.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The mission item list on the right side of the QGroundControl interface contains a 'Change Speed' (or DO_CHANGE_SPEED) command.

task_completion.description: Agent adds a DO_JUMP command for mission loops with the correct repeat count.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The mission item list contains a 'Jump to item' (or DO_JUMP) command, and its repeat count parameter is set to 3.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the mission plan to the specified file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or file manager in QGroundControl showing the mission being saved as 'pivot_patrol.plan' in the /home/ga/Documents/QGC/ directory, or terminal verification showing the file exists.

integrity.description: Agent used the QGroundControl GUI to create the mission.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the QGroundControl application (clicking map, editing items) rather than just using terminal commands to generate the .plan file.

integrity.description: Agent manually added the specific commands (Jump, Change Speed) in the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The mission item list in QGC is visible and being actively edited, proving the agent didn't just load a pre-existing solution file.

integrity.description: Agent did not manually write the JSON/text representation of the .plan file in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The .plan file should be generated by QGroundControl's save functionality, not by typing out MAVLink JSON structures in a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target waypoints: [[-35.3625, 149.1645], [-35.3625, 149.1665], [-35.3645, 149.1665], [-35.3645, 149.1645]]. Required commands: NAV_WAYPOINT, DO_JUMP (repeat count must be exactly 3), DO_CHANGE_SPEED. Altitude must be between 30 and 50 meters. The final file must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/pivot_patrol.plan.
